name: Megumi Shimizu
description: A girl attending the same school as Natsuno, Megumi hates living in the village and longs for city life. She has a one-sided crush on Natsuno and often daydreams of a relationship with him. Megumi encounters the Kirishiki family in the beginning of the series.

name: Nanika
description: Nanika (ナニカ, Nanika—lit. "Something") is a mysterious Dark Continent creature who came to possess Alluka Zoldyck under unknown circumstances. The two currently coexist inside Alluka's body.

name: Reiji Andou
description: Nicknamed "Andre", he is the fat one of the group. He cares deeply about his friends, and is also an extreme masochist.

name: Taroumaru
description: In the anime, Taromaru is notably an intelligent and tolerant dog, putting up with anything Yuki puts him up to and being able to open doors and escape. He is able to avoid infected citizens and escape to the safety of Kei and Miki, and is later found by Kurumi in the mall. He is taken in by the School Life Club members as their "mascot." After upsetting Taromaru at the mall by yelling at him, Taromaru dislikes being around [Miki](https://anilist.co/character/89054/Miki-Naoki), preferring to be

name: Tomoki Sakurai
description: __Height:__ 155 cm An ordinary, highly perverted high-school boy who tries to live his life as peacefully as possible, with his personal motto "Peace and quiet is the best". Since his childhood, he's been having a dream of an angel, which he wakes up from crying. ~! At first, he is repulsed by the appearance of Ikaros as he sees her wings, but he soon gets used to this, although he has no sexual attraction to Angeloids until he meets Delta. name: Xiaolan
description: Xiaolan is a servant in the inner court of the palace. Carefree and easy to please, she looks at her sale to the inner palace as a good thing, since at least she now has proper bedding and meals. She loves gossiping and constantly serves as a source of possibilities for Maomao to brainstorm over.

name: Yuzuha Mishima
description: A fresh recruit who [Yoshida](https://anilist.co/character/127924/) is responsible for training. She often makes mistakes, but always manages to slip away from trouble with a smile that people find hard to dislike.

name: Aoi Kiriya
description: Aoi Kiriya is a student at Starlight School and Ichigo's best friend. Aoi is a calm and bright girl. She is highly determined towards her goals and approaches them very seriously. Aoi makes sure to plan ahead and research as much as she can for a situation. She is hard-working and a bit of a perfectionist. As a child, Aoi quickly became interested in idols after discovering the freedom and excitement of it. Since then, she has dedicated herself to idols.

name: Beelzebub
description: __Species__: God __Affiliation:__ Gods Beelzebub is a prominent deity in the Philistine Pantheon and Abrahamic Pantheon. He is also the Lord of the Flies. ~!Beelzebub is the God's representative in the 8th round of Ragnarok.!~

name: Ennis
description: Szilard's homunculus, though not his first creation. She was created to unthinkingly execute his every command; recently, however, she has been gaining emotions as well as independent thought, as a result of 'devouring' an alchemist threatening Szilard's life. ~!She later helps Firo, giving him the necessary knowledge to destroy Szilard, and afterwards moves in with him as his roommate.!~ ~!Ennis eventually reciprocates Firo's feelings, marrying him in the 1980s and taking his surname 'Prochaine

name: Eriol Hiiragizawa
description: Eriol Hiiragizawa moved from England to transfer to Tomoeda Elementary school. He is depicted as a quiet, mature boy while at school, though he also shows a mischievous side when he regularly joins classmate Takashi Yamazaki in weaving complex lies about the history of objects, places, and events. While seeming a normal student to Sakura, Syaoran Li is suspicious of him.

name: Gin
description: Gin is a member of the Black Organization and a main antagonist of the series. He is the organization member who gave Shinichi Kudo the experimental poison APTX 4869 which turned him into [Conan Edogawa.](https://anilist.co/character/1742/Conan-Edogawa) He is frequently paired on missions with [Vodka.](https://anilist.co/character/6306/Vodka) In the English manga, he was first introduced as Melkior, but later was reverted to Gin. This is likely due to the fact that Conan is often reminded of the

name: Hyun Ryu
description: __Height:__ 182 cm (6'0") A semi-successful actor/dancer/singer. He can come across as narcissistic about his looks, often posting selfies and exclaiming how handsome he is. However, while it may seem he cares about his appearance the most, he wants to be recognized and appreciated first and foremost for his career skills. name: Korisu Morino
description: __Height:__ 128 cm Korisu is a quiet and reserved girl, and the youngest member of Enormeeta. She has a large collection of old toys that are precious to her. Her theme is Alice in Wonderland.

name: Lenka Utsugi
description: The main protagonist of the story and A New-type god eater recruited by the Far East Branch. He cares for his subordinates so much that he forgets to take care of himself during a battle with the aragami. He is willing to give himself up for other people's safety. He soon is brought into the 1st Unit and learns a lot from his superiors. Lenka was named by his sister, Iroha Utsugi, after a flower that blooms from the mud.

name: Lindel
description: Elias' magician master, commonly referred to as Lindel, who lives in the Land of Dragons. His title is Echoes, Song of Flowers. (Source: MAL)

name: Masamune Takano
description: Formerly known as Saga Masamune, before his parents divorced in high school. He is the editor-in-chief of the Emerald department at Marukawa, and is sometimes referred to as "the Capable". He and Ritsu were once in a brief relationship in high school but split up over a misunderstanding, where they both thought each other was wrong. It is revealed that he later had a break down from the break up, family problems, and other personal issues, which in turn left him with an unrequited love for Ritsu

name: Mii
description: Mii is a player in NewWorld Online. She is the guild master of the Flame Emperors guild along side Markus, Misery, and Shin. Mii acquired a skill and unknowingly built up a character with her great charisma that others willingly follow. After realizing this, she became embarrassed to show her true self; a quiet girl who wants to enjoy cute things. She regrets her actions but decided to up appearances for those who chose to follow her.

name: Ponta
description: Arc's traveling companion. Ponta is of the species Bentou Volpies, a spirit beast also known as Fluffy Fox. Arc encounters it caged and hurt when defeating some bandits. He frees and heals it. Which makes it decide to follow Arc, so Arc gives it the name Ponta. The species is known for being very rarely tame.
